Veena Acharya

Technical Writer | Documentation Engineer | Software Engineer

📞 (682) 201-5910 · 📧 acharya.veena14@gmail.com · 🔗 LinkedIn · 💻 Portfolio

Technical Writer with 10+ years of software engineering experience. Specializes in API documentation, developer guides, and technical content that accelerates developer adoption. Deep expertise in Java, Spring Boot, and full-stack development. Translates complex systems into clear, actionable documentation.

Work Experience

GlobalLogic (Walmart-Vizio) · Addison, TX

Senior Analyst — Technical Writing · Aug 2024 – Present

  • Reduced developer onboarding time by 30% with API references, quick start guides, and developer tutorials for platform APIs and third-party integrations
  • Built docs-as-code workflow using Git, Markdown, and GitHub Copilot for AI-assisted content generation
  • Created interactive code samples, architecture diagrams, and troubleshooting guides for developer self-service
  • Established documentation templates and style guides adopted across multiple engineering teams
  • Partnered with product and engineering to align documentation with release cycles
  • Conducted documentation reviews and maintained content accuracy across product updates

OneMain Financial · Evansville, IN

Technology Software Engineer Sr · Aug 2019 – Aug 2024

  • Built Java/Spring Boot microservices and PL/SQL stored procedures for enterprise lending platform serving millions of customers
  • Designed and implemented RESTful APIs with comprehensive OpenAPI specifications
  • Created API documentation, code samples, and SDK examples that accelerated internal developer adoption
  • Authored JUnit testing guides and application design specs for engineering stakeholders
  • Conducted impact analysis and collaborated with product teams to translate business requirements into technical specifications
  • Mentored junior developers on coding standards and documentation best practices

Southwest Airlines · Dallas, TX

Software Engineer · Jun 2017 – Jul 2019

  • Developed enterprise Crew scheduling and Crew web access applications using Java, EJB, WebSphere, and Oracle SQL
  • Built backend services handling flight crew assignments and schedule changes for thousands of crew members
  • Created system architecture documentation, API specifications, and troubleshooting runbooks
  • Designed responsive UI components using HTML, CSS, and jQuery with implementation guides
  • Collaborated with QA team on test case development and defect resolution
  • Supported production deployments and provided on-call technical support

Orchestra Technology · Richardson, TX

Software Engineer · Aug 2015 – Apr 2017

  • Built interactive data visualization dashboards using Tableau, BIRT, and Google Charts
  • Created user guides and configuration documentation for business stakeholders
  • Authored architecture decision records (ADRs), gap analysis reports, and database configuration guides
  • Developed documentation for MySQL integrations and network performance monitoring tools
  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams to gather requirements and deliver solutions
